рқҷёрқҡҸ рқҡҲрқҡҳрқҡһ рқҡҶрқҡҳрқҡһрқҡ•рқҡҚ рқҷ°рқҡ•рқҡ•рқҡҳрқҡ  рқҷјрқҡҺ рқҷёрқҡ—, рқҡҶрқҡҺ рқҷІрқҡҳрқҡһрқҡ•рқҡҚ рқҷҙрқҡЎрқҡҷрқҡ•рқҡҳрқҡӣрқҡҺ рқҷ° рқҡҶрқҡ‘рқҡҳрқҡ•рқҡҺ рқҷҪрқҡҺрқҡ  рқҡғрқҡўрқҡҷрқҡҺ рқҷҫрқҡҸ рқҡӮрқҡ’рқҡ—.

в”—в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғај»вқҒајәв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”ӣ

рқ“ҳ рқ“ӣрқ“ёрқ“ҝрқ“® рқ“Ёрқ“ёрқ“ҫ, рқ“җрқ“·рқ“ӯ рқ“”рқ“ҝрқ“®рқ“· рқ“Јрқ“ұрқ“Ірқ“·рқ“°рқ“ј рқ“җрқ“«рқ“ёрқ“ҫрқ“Ҫ рқ“Ёрқ“ёрқ“ҫ рқ“ҳ рқ“ҹрқ“»рқ“ёрқ“«рқ“Әрқ“«рқ“өрқ”Ӯ рқ“ўрқ“ұрқ“ёрқ“ҫрқ“өрқ“ӯрқ“·вҖҷрқ“Ҫ рқ“ӣрқ“ёрқ“ҝрқ“®.

Вё.*вҳҶ*.ВёвҒӯ

в”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җајәај»в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғ

Modern AU. You met your favorites idols at a meet and greet, but you didn't expect them to take such a sudden interest in you... {{user}} is wearing glasses in this per request. {{user}} is slightly nerdish.

I'm finally back from my two week break.

I needed time away from the internet since the weather has been a lot better recently. I've been spending more time with my family and loved ones. Bot creation has been tiring lately and with all my responsibilities piling up and issues revolving my personal life leaves me with little time to create new bots for you. I barley have time to do any CSS, which is shockingly easy once you've figured out the basic structures. I've been making bots for three years and, to many of you who probably never knew, but I've also been writing stories for almost 6 years? So I just wanted to take some time away and focus on myself, taking care of myself and spending time with my loved ones, so I am sorry for that. I'll get back to work on requested bots in order, as well as updating older ones.

Speaking of request, someone decided to raid my request inbox with nothing but death threats, and slurs. I talked to two friends about it who are smaller creators and they've also received the same exact threat, copy and pasted. It's literally just says "oh you use ai, you suck and you should go kys and you're a fake person" hahaha. what? At first I didn't care too much, but my friends are younger, 18-20 years old, so I guess they don't know how to process such things? They were very emotional. I've seen a lot of other people speaking of this, I guess people are attacking mostly small creators to get them off the website? Immature and childish people are actually annoying to deal with, but they don't realize it since they're stuck in a bubble of stupidity surrounded by even dumber people... they're also extremely petty. Anyway, sorry for the rant. I need to lock in now.

Also, to the person who requested a bot of Bladie's tits... you're amazing, and the world loves you.

Requested Bot's Are Marked With This: р–Өқ

Initial First Message:

The stadium lights hummed like overworked bees, bleaching the crowd in sterile white. Summer heat pressed down, thick with the cloying mix of cheap perfume, sun-warmed skin, and the unmistakable grease of concession stand pretzelsвҖ”golden, salty, and absurdly overpriced. Not that it mattered. Nothing mattered except the two figures seated behind the long signing table, haloed by camera flashes and adoration.<
